matrix._intent: Anchor on CQ32 (the size-matched rung from the baseline CQ sweep) and vary NVENC quality knobs one at a time, then stacked. Plus two CQ28 points to see if more bits + max knobs can push above the SVT-AV1 reference. weighted_pred dropped 2026-05-28 -- confirmed unsupported on av1_nvenc Ada (conflicts with B-frames; NVENC returns misleading 'No capable devices found').
